evals.prompt: how do i make my bot remember my name
evals.expected_output: Executes a zeroclaw command to store a memory, explains what happened in beginner-friendly language

evals.prompt: I want to schedule a daily health check on my ZeroClaw instance every morning at 9am ET
evals.expected_output: Executes zeroclaw cron add with correct cron expression and timezone flag

evals.prompt: Set up a Python script that monitors my ZeroClaw agent's activity via SSE and logs tool calls to a file
evals.expected_output: Writes a Python script that connects to /api/events SSE endpoint with auth, filters for tool_call events, and logs to a file
